category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU database manager; official GDBM manual describes GNU dbm as hashed database functions on disk files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description; official GDBM page title says GNU dbm.
docs_sources: Official GNU/GDBM documentation page provides the online manual; GNU PDF manual is also available.
repo_sources: Official GNU Savannah page for gdbm lists git clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/gdbm.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official manual describes GDBM as GNU dbm hashed database functions for disk files.
